title: orchis quadripunctata subsp. brancifortii
intro: Orchis quadripunctata subsp. brancifortii, also known as Branciforte's orchid, is a subspecies of orchid that belongs to the genus Orchis. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Orchis quadripunctata subsp. brancifortii are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as reduced inflammation and improved wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's tubers are typically dried and powdered, then used to make teas, infusions, or other medicinal remedies.
